heading: Sums received by the Bureau of Land Management from vendors under enterprise information technology-procurements
label: 1474f Sums received by the Bureau of Land Management from vendors under enterprise information technology-procurements
text: Sums not to exceed 1 percent of the total value of procurements received by the Bureau of Land Management from vendors under enterprise information technology-procurements that the Department of the Interior and other Federal Government agencies may use to order information technology on and after , may be deposited into the Management of Lands and Resources account to offset costs incurred in conducting the procurement.March 11, 2009
notes: Prior Similar ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation act:, , .Pub. L. 110–161, div. F, title I121 Stat. 2101Dec. 26, 2007
amendments: Prior Similar ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation act:, , .Pub. L. 110–161, div. F, title I121 Stat. 2101Dec. 26, 2007
